channel.title: Shiv Khera on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Shiv Khera on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Building the nation - Shiv Khera
item.description:
It has been more than 50 years since we got freedom and we all are aware that politics and corruption have screwed up the whole system of India. I was watching a video by Shiv Khera where he calls to build a corruption free nation. A must watch for every Indian:

Part 1:

Part 2:

Part 3:

Also, there are 2 videos in Hindi:

Part 1:

Part 2:

Comments

Comment by Brig Gulshan Rai(Retd)-AOC(Known to Gen P Sagar on 2008-08-11 13:38:26 +0530

Mr Khera has the perfect appreciation of where we stand as a nation today.He has to galvanise support of the masses.Most indians want sweeping changes. Yes, the politician,bureaucracy,the police and the entire judicial system is termite infested!Lets get going soonest! Iam available to join the Party. Just give me a shout!
